name: graphql-analytics
description: Lightweight, self-hostable analytics tool for GraphQL APIs

scripts.build: npm run build:collector && npm run build --workspace=packages/sdk && npm run build --workspace=apps/dashboard && npm run build --workspace=apps/test-server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=packages/sdk" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/collector" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/dashboard"
